content: getLoginProviderOptions merges OAuth providers with every model provider; providers without OAuth are classified as api_key.
note: Confirms extension custom providers can enter /login -> Use an API key.

content: showApiKeyLoginDialog prompts only Enter API key and stores an api_key credential before refreshing the registry.
note: Disproves direct Base URL entry inside the native API-key dialog.

content: ProviderConfig exposes name, baseUrl, apiKey, api, models, and optional OAuth metadata.
note: URL/model capabilities belong to provider registration while the API-key dialog owns only the secret.

content: registerProvider validates and applies custom provider models; OAuth is optional and only needed for subscription flows.
note: Supports a custom provider with API metadata and no OAuth.

content: Reference checkout is pi-coding-agent 0.80.3 while the current plugin development dependency is 0.74.0.
note: The core login classification is shared, but new auth internals must not be assumed available in 0.74.0.

content: Provider regression suite verifies custom maestro-openai/maestro-anthropic API registration, URL persistence, command wiring, and DeepSeek isolation.
Fresh Pi lists maestro-openai/gpt-5.4 and independently lists deepseek-v4-flash plus deepseek-v4-pro.
note: Confirms model visibility and absence of cross-provider mutation.
